sn56.12:0.2: 2. The Chapter on Setting in Motion the Wheel of Dhamma
sn56.12:1.1: “‘This is the noble truth of *dukkha*,’ *bhikkhus*: among dhammas unheard before, for the Realized Ones, vision arose, knowledge arose, discernment [*paññā*] arose, true knowledge arose, light arose.
sn56.12:1.2: ‘And this noble truth of *dukkha* is to be fully understood,’ *bhikkhus*: for the Realized Ones, before … arose.
sn56.12:1.3: ‘And this noble truth of *dukkha* has been fully understood,’ *bhikkhus*: among dhammas unheard before, for the Realized Ones, vision arose, knowledge arose, discernment [*paññā*] arose, true knowledge arose, light arose.
sn56.12:2.1: ‘This is the noble truth of the origin of *dukkha*,’ *bhikkhus*: among dhammas unheard before, for the Realized Ones, vision arose, knowledge arose, discernment [*paññā*] arose, true knowledge arose, light arose.
sn56.12:2.2: ‘And this noble truth of the origin of *dukkha* is to be abandoned,’ *bhikkhus*: for the Realized Ones, before … arose.
sn56.12:2.3: ‘And this noble truth of the origin of *dukkha* has been abandoned,’ *bhikkhus*: among dhammas unheard before, for the Realized Ones, vision arose, knowledge arose, discernment [*paññā*] arose, true knowledge arose, light arose.
sn56.12:3.1: ‘This is the noble truth of the cessation of *dukkha*,’ *bhikkhus*: among dhammas unheard before, for the Realized Ones, vision arose, knowledge arose, discernment [*paññā*] arose, true knowledge arose, light arose.
sn56.12:3.2: ‘And this noble truth of the cessation of *dukkha* is to be realized,’ *bhikkhus*: for the Realized Ones, before … arose.
sn56.12:3.3: ‘And this noble truth of the cessation of *dukkha* has been realized,’ *bhikkhus*: among dhammas unheard before, for the Realized Ones, vision arose, knowledge arose, discernment [*paññā*] arose, true knowledge arose, light arose.
sn56.12:4.1: ‘This is the noble truth of the way of practice leading to the cessation of *dukkha*,’ *bhikkhus*: among dhammas unheard before, for the Realized Ones, vision arose, knowledge arose, discernment [*paññā*] arose, true knowledge arose, light arose.
sn56.12:4.2: ‘And this noble truth of the way of practice leading to the cessation of *dukkha* is to be developed [*bhāvetabbaṁ*],’ *bhikkhus*: for the Realized Ones, before … arose.
sn56.12:4.3: ‘And this noble truth of the way of practice leading to the cessation of *dukkha* has been developed [*bhāvitaṁ*],’ *bhikkhus*: among dhammas unheard before, for the Realized Ones, vision arose, knowledge arose, discernment [*paññā*] arose, true knowledge arose, light arose.”
